settings.title: Mail Reply
settings.general_section_help: Delivery mode, reply mailbox, and alias security.
settings.webhook_section_help: Configure an external provider (Mailgun/Postmark/Cloudflare) OR run the PHP script on the mail server.
settings.imap_test_help: Verifies Flarum can connect with the saved credentials.
settings.providers_help: Configure the provider to POST directly to the endpoint — no script.
settings.mode_warning: This tab is only active when the matching Delivery mode is selected. Go back to General to change it.
settings.delivery_mode_help: Choose ONE way of receiving replies. The other endpoints are deactivated automatically.
settings.mode_webhook_option: Webhook + PHP script on mail server
settings.mode_imap_active: ✓ IMAP poller active. The mail-reply:fetch job runs inside queue:work and polls the mailbox every minute. /api/mail-reply/inbound returns 403.
settings.mode_webhook_active: ✓ Webhook active. POST to /api/mail-reply/inbound with header X-Mail-Reply-Token. IMAP poller paused. PHP script below to install on mail server.
settings.mode_disabled_active: ✗ Inbound disabled. Notifications still go out with Reply-To, but no replies are processed back into the forum.
settings.webhook_script_label: Standalone PHP script (alternative to a provider)
settings.webhook_secret_help: Required header X-Mail-Reply-Token in POST /api/mail-reply/inbound. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32
settings.webhook_script_help: Install this script on the mail server (not Flarum). Save as /usr/local/bin/forward-to-flarum.php, chmod 755, configure the Forwarder/alias of the reply domain to pipe to it.
settings.reply_address_help: Dedicated mailbox that receives replies. Must accept any +alias under the same local part. Example, inbox@reply.example.com.
settings.forwarding_address_help: Flarum notifications go out unchanged. A Reply-To header is added so when users click Reply the message lands on a +TAG alias of this mailbox.
settings.mailbox_pending: Fill in the "Reply mailbox" field above to see the pattern.
settings.secret_help: Signs reply aliases so they cannot be forged. Leave blank to auto-generate on first use. Do NOT change after notifications are out — old aliases become invalid.
settings.show_badge_help: Display a small badge next to posts that were created from an inbound email reply.
settings.imap_host_help: Server to poll for replies. Requires webklex/php-imap.
settings.imap_port_help: Typically 993 for SSL/TLS, 143 for STARTTLS or plain.
settings.imap_encryption_help: SSL/TLS recommended; "none" only for trusted intranet setups.
settings.imap_username_help: Usually the full reply mailbox address.
settings.imap_password_help: App-password recommended (Gmail, Microsoft 365). Stored as plain text — limit admin access.
settings.imap_delete_after_help: When disabled, messages are only flagged as Seen — useful while testing.
settings.imap_validate_cert_help: Keep enabled in production; disable only when testing with a self-signed cert.
